title: F1v $select projection of the eight per-input vintage date columns for BBL 1000010100
capture_method: live curl GET by M1-T002 producer, tokenless, single KB-scale request (polite shared-pool use)
notes: All eight vintage columns (basempdate..zoningdate) are NULL for this record: SODA omits null fields even under $select, so only bbl is returned. Proves vintage dates are per-record nullable; connector captures them only when present.
